parsed_profile.overall_arc_function: Hybrid escalation engine combining supernatural rescue mission core with romantic rivalry spectacle mechanics. Protagonist operates under dual-layer motivation: surface-level romantic competition concealing deeper underworld descent agenda for trapped family soul retrieval.
parsed_profile.dominant_engine: Rivalry-confrontation spectacle engine — love interest behavioral manipulation triggers protagonist jealousy, escalating personal conflict into public entertainment through spectator witness coercion, resolved through physical dominance display with dramatic exit payoff.
parsed_profile.narrative_mode: Spectacle-driven escalation with intermittent supernatural system revelation. Personal conflicts transform into public performance under audience demand pressure.
parsed_profile.emotional_architecture: Tension accumulation → jealousy trigger event → physical confrontation → dominance resolution → dramatic departure → romantic tension residue
parsed_profile.pacing_observations: Severely limited by data quality. Single documented turning point (chapter 28) carries disproportionate arc weight. Volume 1 establishes supernatural system mechanics while Volumes 2-6 data unavailable for pattern analysis.
parsed_profile.reader_reward_philosophy: Dual payoff structure: (1) revelation reward through backstory motivation reveal, (2) satisfaction reward through protagonist dominance display under public spectacle pressure. Love interest mercy toward rival introduces moral complexity and relationship tension.

reader_promise.primary_promise: Protagonist will navigate romantic rivalry under public spectacle pressure while secretly pursuing supernatural rescue mission for trapped family soul from underworld realm.
guaranteed_satisfactions: Physical dominance resolution to jealousy conflicts
Supernatural system mechanics revealed through live ritual execution
Backstory motivation revelation with emotional payoff
Dramatic exit spectacle generating relationship tension
Moral complexity through love interest mercy patterns
open_questions_preserved: Will protagonist successfully access supernatural underworld realm?
How will love interest's mercy toward rival affect protagonist relationship?
Will protagonist's jealousy response alienate or satisfy reader expectations?
What consequences arise from servant tool degradation in supernatural pursuits?

trigger_sequence: Love interest introduces rival suitor deliberately
Rival executes grandstanding romantic gesture using contrasting approach
Protagonist jealousy activated by deeper mission urgency
Spectator witnesses transform conflict into entertainment
engine_variants: Jealousy provocation through deliberate romantic threat
Foreign/charming approach vs traditional dominance contrast
Mercy pattern creating moral complexity and relationship friction

Re-distillation of source chapters 26-138 required with functional LLM extraction pipeline to validate arc trajectory, confirm mechanism persistence, and assess failure mode evolution.
